name: Attention Insight
description: AI-powered predictive attention analytics platform that generates eye-tracking heatmaps for UI designs, ads, and product packaging before launch without real user sessions.

seo.title: Attention Insight — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Attention Insight: AI-powered predictive attention analytics platform that generates eye-tracking heatmaps for UI designs, ads, and product packaging before lau

when_to_use: Pre-launch heatmap prediction for landing page layout
A/B test UI hierarchy before live user testing
Hero section attention score compared across variants
Ad creative fold analysis without recruiting participants
Onboarding flow CTA visibility check using AI eye tracking

pros: Predicts attention heatmaps without real-user studies
Fast feedback loop for pre-launch design iteration
Useful second opinion on hierarchy and focus areas
cons: Model is a proxy for attention, not ground truth
Accuracy varies by content type and layout complexity
Can create false confidence in untested designs
review.verdict: Useful directional tool for pre-launch attention checks, but don't treat predicted heatmaps as a substitute for user testing.
review.best_for: Designers and marketers iterating on ads, packaging, and UIs pre-launch.
review.not_for: Replacing real user research or making high-stakes design decisions.
